sections.heading: Data Model & Graph Schema
sections.content:
Define the structure of the nodes and edges added to the Cortex graph. For your project, this is where you define how code nodes link to doc nodes.

| Node Type | Properties | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `code_node` | `id, logic_hash` | Represents the function body |
| `doc_node` | `id, content_hash` | Represents the docstring |

sections.heading: Implementation Trade-offs
sections.content:
Explain why you chose this path over alternatives. 

*Example:* 'I chose AST parsing over basic file timestamps because timestamps flag doc changes even when the logic is identical, leading to false positives.'

sections.heading: Technical Verification
sections.content: How will you verify this works technically? List specific test cases or edge cases (e.g., 'Ensure nested functions are correctly identified by the AST walker').
